creator: mike.jakubik@intertainservices.com
text:
Just wanted to mention that I have the same problem.

FreeBSD freebsd.local 9.2-STABLE FreeBSD 9.2-STABLE #0: Mon Jan  6 
14:29:07 EST 2014

$ remmina

Remmina plugin RDPF (type=File) registered.
Remmina plugin RDPS (type=Preference) registered.
Remmina plugin VNC (type=Protocol) registered.
Remmina plugin VNCI (type=Protocol) registered.
loading channel cliprdr (static)
connected to archimonde.local:3389
connected to archimonde.local:3389
connected to archimonde.local:3389
Unable to detect time zone
/usr/local/lib/remmina/plugins/remmina-plugin-rdp.so: Undefined symbol 
"gdk_pixbuf_get_from_surface"
